title: OptiFine Unbound Zoom Fix
description: OptiFine zoom activates on media keys when unbound in 1.7.10 and below. This mod fixes that.
body: OptiFine zoom activates on media keys when unbound in 1.7.10 and below. This mod fixes that. On 1.6 and below, Esc sets itself as the keybind instead of None but if this is fixed with another mod this mod may still have an effect.
